heroSub: A premium, lightning-fast suite that tracks active field deployments, orchestrates workforce rosters, and monitors FMIS gateways in real-time.

footer.cta_sub: Join industry leaders and schedule a live system demonstration today.
footer.brand_sub: A unified enterprise command suite coordinating operations, medical workflows, and human capital life-cycles into a singular control core.

demo_cta_sub: Join the future of operational intelligence with Operix.
aboutSub: We design tech-driven, proprietary solutions engineered to optimize field workforce productivity, maximize profitability, and eliminate structural loss.
contactSub: Submit your corporate specifications below to consult with our system implementation architects.
founderSub: OPERIX Solutions was architected under the strategic structural vision of Co-Founder Asim Aljma'an, designing specialized workflow layers to maximize company efficiency.
qaSub: Comprehensive answers regarding the OPERIX ecosystem, technical integrations, and implementation strategies.
faqG1_Q: What is the typical implementation timeline?
faqG1_A: Standard deployment takes 4-8 weeks depending on the number of modules and customization requirements. Our engineering team handles the full migration from your legacy systems.
faqG2_A: To ensure strict compliance with Saudi regulations, all data is hosted in Tier-3 local data centers within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, protected by enterprise-grade encryption.
faqG3_Q: Do you support custom enterprise deployments?
faqG3_A: Yes. For large organizations with specific data residency needs, we offer dedicated virtual instances (Private Cloud) with custom SLA agreements.
faqF2_Q: How does the Retail POS sync with the Ledger?
faqF2_A: Synchronization is instantaneous. Every storefront transaction automatically updates inventory levels and records the corresponding entry in the General Ledger.
faqH1_Q: Does HRIS integrate with Qiwa and Muqeem?
faqH1_A: Yes. Our HRIS features built-in API gateways for Qiwa and Muqeem, allowing you to manage contracts and visas directly from your OPERIX dashboard.
faqC1_Q: Is OPERIX Care compliant with CCHI standards?
faqC1_A: Yes, OPERIX Care is engineered in strict compliance with Saudi CCHI regulations and international HIPAA standards for data protection.
faqC2_A: It allows physicians and surgeons to dictate clinical notes directly into the patient's EMR, reducing administrative time by up to 60%.
faqO1_Q: What is the Field ANPR Gateway?
faqO1_A: The Automatic Number-Plate Recognition gateway logs vehicle movements in real-time, automating logistics tracking and parking fee calculations for field sites.
faqO2_Q: Can I map my business strategy to IT execution?
faqO2_A: Yes. The OPS Architecture Planner uses D3.js canvases to visually map human capital and data layers against your strategic ROI goals.
faqE1_Q: What is Dox Studio in the Edu module?
faqE1_A: Dox Studio is a high-performance document engine that automates the generation of official certificates, grade transcripts, and enrollment documents with professional formatting.
philBody: We believe that complexity is the enemy of growth. Our systems are designed to strip away the noise, leaving only the essential data required for decisive action. We don't just build software; we architect operational certainty.
effBody: Efficiency is not just about speed; it's about structural integrity. Every module in the Operix ecosystem is stress-tested to handle the most demanding enterprise environments in the Middle East.
visionBody: To be the foundational digital infrastructure for the next generation of industrial and commercial giants in the region.
missionBody: Empowering organizations through high-performance, minimalist software that transforms raw data into strategic operational advantage.
studioOPSDesc: Real-time logistics, field deployment tracking, and operational flow management.
studioHRISDesc: Strategic workforce management, Qiwa/Muqeem integration, and automated payroll.
studioFMISDesc: Real-time ledger sync and comprehensive fiscal reporting.
studioCareDesc: CCHI-compliant medical records, physician dictation, and clinic workflow automation.
studioEduDesc: Automated certificate generation, student lifecycle tracking, and academic reporting.
studioHasadDesc: A collaborative ecosystem for community engagement and shared social value.
visionSub: Our vision is to empower organizations across the MENA region with digital infrastructure that guarantees operational supremacy.
nodeRiyadhDesc: Global Headquarters. Command core for regional infrastructure.
nodeKhartoumDesc: Strategic hub for tailored digital solutions.
subSuccessSub: System architects are verifying your industrial profile.
legalGovCompDesc: OPERIX platforms operate in full structural alignment with the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development parameters. The HRIS enforces strict audit controls mandated by the Wage Protection System (WPS).
legalDataSovDesc: All records are hosted exclusively on classified cloud servers within the territorial boundaries of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, complying with NCA mandates and local data governance policies.
legalPrivacyDesc: The platform employs AES-256 encryption for all data at rest and TLS 1.3 for all data in transit. BYOK is enforced at vault level to ensure zero unauthorized access.
philIntegratedBody: Complex systems shouldn't require complex training. Our vision is to build an ERP ecosystem so intuitive that learning curves disappear. A fully integrated circle where whatever you need is already inside.
philResilienceBody: Difficult conditions don't prevent evolution—they amplify the need for it. We build the technical tools that keep enterprises moving forward, no matter the challenges.
homeMenaGrowthDesc: We build the digital foundational layers for high-performance enterprises, ensuring absolute operational visibility and structural resilience across every deployment.
studioSysArchDesc: Our ecosystems are built on a sharded micro-service architecture, ensuring that each operational layer maintains absolute autonomy while remaining perfectly synchronized via our proprietary Core-Link gateway.
studioHeroTitle: ENGINEERING THE INFRASTRUCTURE OF THE FUTURE.
studioArchDesc: Modular frameworks designed for infinite scalability across enterprise domains.
studioIntDesc: Seamless API gateways connecting local regulatory cores with global standards.
studioVelDesc: Proprietary logic layers optimized for zero-latency operational control.
mobileHasadDesc: Real estate and property management ecosystem.
mobileHubDesc: Unified mobile command for HR and field operations.
mobileOPSDesc: Flagship operations command center as a PWA.
homeNarrative1Body: In an era of global volatility, Operix provides the foundational layers for regional digital sovereignty. We architect systems that belong to the future of the Middle East, ensuring that enterprise data remains a strategic national asset. Our approach integrates localized data governance with global performance standards, creating a fortress of digital autonomy.
homeNarrative2Body: Fragmented operations are the silent killers of profitability. Operix unifies the disparate—logistics, human capital, and fiscal flow—into a singular, crystalline control core. One ecosystem. Zero friction. By eliminating the silos that traditionally divide departments, we enable a level of organizational agility that was previously impossible.
homeNarrative3Body: Beyond simple automation, our systems learn from the rhythm of your operations. We don't just record data; we provide the predictive insights required to stay ahead of the curve. This is the transition from reactive management to proactive orchestration, powered by the most advanced logic layers in the region.
studioNarrativeBody: Every line of code is a commitment to precision. Our studio doesn't just produce software; it designs industrial-grade operational environments where resilience is baked into the architecture from day zero. We view software as the new industrial bedrock—the foundation upon which modern empires are built.
visionNarrativeBody: We envision a region where every enterprise is a fortress of efficiency. By providing the technical bedrock, we enable organizations to weather any storm and emerge stronger, driving the Vision 2030 goals with technical supremacy. Our mission is to accelerate the transition to a knowledge-based economy through unparalleled technical innovation.
studioOPSCase: Used by national logistics carriers to track over 500,000 movements monthly with 99.9% accuracy.
studioHRISCase: Managing a workforce of 50,000+ employees across the MENA region with automated regulatory compliance.
studioFMISCase: Powering the fiscal operations of multi-entity conglomerates with real-time consolidated ledger tech.
studioCareCase: Supporting leading surgical centers with AI-driven EMR and real-time clinical telemetry.
studioEduCase: Modernizing academic institutions with automated certification and student lifecycle orchestration.
studioHasadCase: Building connected communities through smart real-estate and shared social value systems.
opLayer1Body: Deploying logic directly at the point of action. Our edge nodes process critical operational data with zero latency, ensuring that field decisions are backed by real-time intelligence.
opLayer2Body: The central nervous system of your enterprise. A sharded, high-performance cloud environment that synchronizes every department into a single, immutable source of truth.
opLayer3Body: Ensuring absolute sovereignty. All enterprise intelligence remains within regional borders, protected by classification-grade encryption and strict local regulatory compliance.
opLayer4Body: Beyond simple logic. Our predictive engines analyze operational rhythms to provide the foresight required for long-term strategic supremacy and risk mitigation.
studioOPSTactical: Reduces fuel and maintenance overhead by up to 22% through predictive route optimization and real-time asset health monitoring.
studioHRISTactical: Eliminates 95% of manual compliance overhead by automating Muqeem, Qiwa, and WPS integration at the core level.
studioFMISTactical: Ensures zero-loss fiscal tracking with instantaneous storefront-to-ledger synchronization and multi-region tax automation.
studioCareTactical: Increases clinical efficiency by 40% through AI-assisted physician dictation and automated patient lifecycle telemetry.
studioEduTactical: Modernizes institutional reputation with blockchain-verified certification and seamless student enrollment orchestration.
studioHasadTactical: Maximizes social ROI by creating a unified digital layer for community engagement and sustainable resource management.
